title: Hisar NCSC For SC/ ST Admission Offline Form

sections.title: Set as Preferred Source on Google

content.text: NCSC Free Coaching / Training Admission 2026 : Get complete details about NCSC Free Coaching / Training Admission 2026, including admission updates, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, exam date, interview date, result, and more.

rows.text: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Govt of India NCSC Free Coaching / Training Admission 2026-27 Short Details of NCSC Admission For SC/ST Notice
Starting Date : –/05/2026 Last Date : 15/06/2026 05:00 PM Course Start : From 01/07/2026
Special Coaching Scheme : 18-27 Years For All Other Courses : 18-30 Years The Age Limit as on : 01/07/2026

Qualification : 12th Class Passed. Course Duration : 01 Year & Short Term Courses Annual Family Income : Less Than 03 Lakh. Monthly Stipend : Rs. 1000/- (Only For 01 Year Courses) Books and Stationery : Free

10th Marksheet 12th Marksheet Caste certificate Family Annual Income Certificate Domicile Certificate Aadhaar Card Copy 03 Photographs Certificate of Registration of Name in Employment Office Bank Passbook with DBT Linked
